---
jupyter:
  jupytext:
    text_representation:
      extension: .Rmd
      format_name: rmarkdown
      format_version: '1.2'
      jupytext_version: 1.16.1
  kernelspec:
    display_name: Python 3 (ipykernel)
    language: python
    name: python3
---

### NEP photon study correcting QubicInstrument

```{python}
from pyoperators import MPI

from qubic.lib.MapMaking.FrequencyMapMaking.Qfmm import PipelineEnd2End # wrapper de pipeline frecuency map making
from qubic.lib.MapMaking.FrequencyMapMaking.Qfmm import PipelineFrequencyMapMaking
import sys
import yaml
from mpi4py import MPI

comm = MPI.COMM_WORLD
```

```{python}
import matplotlib.pyplot as plt
import numpy as np
```

```{python}
from qubic.lib.Instrument.Qnoise import QubicTotNoise
from qubic.lib.Instrument.Qacquisition import QubicAcquisition
from qubic.lib.Instrument.Qinstrument_corrected import QubicInstrument

from pysimulators import (
    ConvolutionTruncatedExponentialOperator,
    Instrument,
    Layout,
    ProjectionOperator,
)
```

```{python}
from qubic.lib.Instrument.Qinstrument_corrected import compute_freq

```

working with the most general case: DB,  FI

```{python}
# read the yalm 
with open("/home/belen/Doctorado/qubic-dev/qubic/qubic/scripts/MapMaking/src/FMM/params_test.yml", "r") as f:
    params = yaml.safe_load(f)
```

```{python}
params
```

```{python}
file = "salida.pkl"
mapmaker = PipelineFrequencyMapMaking(comm, file, params)
```

```{python}
### seeting the configuration 
### dict out from pipeline_demo, but it should be rewritten depending of the band that we use and so on
```

```{python}
dict_out = mapmaker.get_dict(key="out")
joint = mapmaker.joint
```

```{python}
dict_out
```

```{python}
# I follow here what's is thone in Qnoise
```

```{python}
if dict_out['instrument_type'] == 'DB':
    band_used = [150, 220]

instruments = {}
for band in band_used: 
    d = dict_out.copy()
    d['debug'] = True
    d['band'] = band 
    d["filter_nu"] = int(band) * 1e9
    d["nf_sub"] = 1
    d["nf_recon"] = 1

    
    instruments[f"inst_{band}"] = QubicInstrument(d)

```

```{python}
instruments
```

```{python}
def TOD_noise(inst): 
    pho_noise = inst.get_noise(joint.qubic.sampling, joint.qubic.scene, det_noise=False, photon_noise=True)
    det_noise = inst.get_noise(joint.qubic.sampling, joint.qubic.scene, det_noise=True, photon_noise=False)
    total_noise = inst.get_noise(joint.qubic.sampling, joint.qubic.scene, det_noise=True, photon_noise=True)
    
    return pho_noise, det_noise, total_noise
```

```{python}
pho150, det150, total150 = TOD_noise(instruments['inst_150'])
pho220, det220, total220 = TOD_noise(instruments['inst_220'])

```

```{python}
samp = joint.qubic.sampling.index
```

```{python}
# %matplotlib inline
```

```{python}
plt.plot(samp, np.mean(det150, axis=0), color='blue', label='detector noise')
plt.fill_between(samp, y1 = np.mean(det150, axis=0) - np.std(det150, axis=0), y2 = np.mean(det150, axis=0) + np.std(det150, axis=0), color='blue', alpha=0.2)

plt.plot(samp, np.mean(pho150, axis=0), color='red', label='photon noise')
plt.fill_between(samp, y1 = np.mean(pho150, axis=0) - np.std(pho150, axis=0), y2 = np.mean(pho150, axis=0) + np.std(pho150, axis=0), color='red', alpha=0.2)

plt.plot(samp, np.mean(total150, axis=0), color='green', label='total noise')
plt.fill_between(samp, y1 = np.mean(total150, axis=0) - np.std(total150, axis=0), y2 = np.mean(total150, axis=0) + np.std(total150, axis=0), color='green',  alpha=0.2)


plt.legend()
plt.title('mean and std in all detectors')
plt.xlabel('Time')
plt.ylabel('NEP')
plt.show()
```

```{python}
plt.plot(samp, np.mean(det220, axis=0), color='blue', label='detector noise')
plt.fill_between(samp, y1 = np.mean(det220, axis=0) - np.std(det220, axis=0), y2 = np.mean(det220, axis=0) + np.std(det220, axis=0), color='blue', alpha=0.2)

plt.plot(samp, np.mean(pho220, axis=0), color='red', label='photon noise')
plt.fill_between(samp, y1 = np.mean(pho220, axis=0) - np.std(pho220, axis=0), y2 = np.mean(pho220, axis=0) + np.std(pho220, axis=0), color='red', alpha=0.2)

plt.plot(samp, np.mean(total220, axis=0), color='green', label='total noise')
plt.fill_between(samp, y1 = np.mean(total220, axis=0) - np.std(total220, axis=0), y2 = np.mean(total220, axis=0) + np.std(total220, axis=0), color='green',  alpha=0.2)


plt.legend()
plt.title('mean and std in all detectors')
plt.xlabel('Time')
plt.ylabel('NEP')
plt.show()
```

```{python}
#plt.hist(np.mean(total150, axis=1), bins=30, color='green', alpha = 0.7, label='total noise' )
plt.hist(np.mean(pho150, axis=1), bins=30, color='red', alpha = 0.7, label='photon noise')
#plt.hist(np.mean(det150, axis=1), bins=30, color='blue', alpha = 0.7, label='detector noise' )
plt.xlabel('NEP')
plt.legend()
plt.title('Histogram of NEP values in each detector')
```

```{python}
#plt.hist(np.mean(total220, axis=1), bins=30, color='green', alpha = 0.7, label='total noise' )
#plt.hist(np.mean(det220, axis=1), bins=30, color='blue', alpha = 0.7, label='detector noise' )
plt.hist(np.mean(pho220, axis=1), bins=30, color='red', alpha = 0.7, label='photon noise')

plt.xlabel('NEP')
plt.legend()
plt.title('Histogram of NEP values in each detector')
```

Total NEP per detector

```{python}
inst150 = instruments['inst_150']
inst220 = instruments['inst_220']
```

```{python}
nep_photon150 = inst150._get_noise_photon_nep(joint.qubic.scene)
nep_photon220 = inst220._get_noise_photon_nep(joint.qubic.scene)

```

```{python}
inst150
```

```{python}

```

```{python}
# %matplotlib inline
```

```{python}
plt.scatter(np.arange(len(nep_photon220)), nep_photon220, c= nep_photon220 )
plt.xlabel('Nº detector')
plt.ylabel('photon NEP')
plt.colorbar()
plt.title('220 band')
plt.show()
```

```{python}
plt.scatter(np.arange(len(nep_photon150)), nep_photon150/np.sqrt(2), c= nep_photon150/np.sqrt(2) )
plt.xlabel('Nº detector')
plt.ylabel('photon NEP')
plt.title('150 band')
plt.colorbar()
plt.show()
```

```{python}
noisepar_150 = inst150.load_NEP_parameters(joint.qubic.scene)
```

```{python}
noisepar_220 = inst220.load_NEP_parameters(joint.qubic.scene)
```

```{python}
from scipy.constants import c, h, k, sigma

print('number of modes')
print(((noisepar_150.S_horns_eff*inst150.primary_beam.solid_angle)*(inst150.filter.nu/c)**2)/len(inst150.horn))
```

```{python}
print(((noisepar_150.S_horns_eff*np.mean(noisepar_150.omega_det))*(inst150.filter.nu/c)**2)/len(inst150.horn))
```

```{python}
print(((noisepar_150.S_det*np.mean(noisepar_150.omega_det))*(inst150.filter.nu/c)**2)/len(inst150.horn))
```

```{python}
print(((noisepar_150.S_det*noisepar_150.omega_comb)*(inst150.filter.nu/c)**2)/len(inst150.horn))
```

```{python}

```

```{python}
noisepar_150.names
```

```{python}
noisepar_220.names
```

```{python}

```

```{python}
plt.scatter(inst150.detector.center.T[0], inst150.detector.center.T[1], c = noisepar_150.sec_beam, marker = 's')
plt.colorbar()
plt.title('Sec beam')
plt.show()
```

```{python}

```

NEP per component

```{python}
# components per band 

# 1. NEP before horns array 


# 150: 
# 2. NEP horns
# 3. NEP environment 
# 4. NEP combiner 
# 5. NEP coldspot 
# 6. neutral density (no se bien) 
# 7. lowpassedge (2)

# 220: 
# 2. NEP horns
# 3. NEP environment
# 4. NEP combiner 
# 5. NEP coldspot 
# 6. NEP dichroic
# 7. NEP lfiter 220 (3)

# 8. NEP last_filter

```

```{python}
noisepar_220.indf
```

```{python}
sampling = joint.qubic.sampling

```

```{python}
epsilon = 1.0e-3  # one mHz of margin for the comparisons to compensate for python roundoff error
nu1 = 150e9
nu2 = 220e9
FRBW = 0.25


nu1_up = nu1 * (1 + FRBW / 2) + epsilon
nu1_down =  nu1 * (1 - FRBW / 2) - epsilon

nu2_up = nu2 * (1 + FRBW / 2) + epsilon
nu2_down =  nu2 * (1 - FRBW / 2) - epsilon

```

```{python}
nu1_down
```

```{python}
def load_NEP_components(inst, noisepar, band_150 = True):
    
    if band_150:
        nu_low, nu_up = nu1_down, nu1_up
    else:
        nu_low, nu_up = nu2_down, nu2_up
    
    dict_before_horns = inst.NEP_before_horns(noisepar, noisepar.nu, return_only=True, sampling=sampling) # se reescriben los 12 primeros NEP para cada detector
    
    dict_horns = inst.NEP_horns(noisepar, nu_low, nu_up, return_only=True, sampling=sampling)
    dict_env = inst.NEP_environment(noisepar, noisepar.names, nu_low, nu_up, return_only=True, sampling=sampling)
    dict_combiner = inst.NEP_combiner(noisepar, nu_low, nu_up, return_only=True, sampling=sampling)
    dict_coldspot = inst.NEP_coldstop(noisepar, nu_low, nu_up, return_only=True, sampling=sampling)
    dict_dich = inst.NEP_dichroic(noisepar, nu_low, nu_up, return_only=True, sampling=sampling)

    
    if band_150:
        dict_ndf = inst.NEP_neutraldensityfilter(noisepar, nu_low, nu_up, return_only=True, sampling=sampling)
        dict_lpe1 = inst.NEP_lowpassedge(noisepar, noisepar.lpe1, nu_low, nu_up, return_only=True, sampling=sampling)
        dict_lpe2 = inst.NEP_lowpassedge(noisepar, noisepar.lpe2, nu_low, nu_up, return_only=True, sampling=sampling)
    else: 
        dict_ndf = inst.NEP_lpefilter_220(noisepar, noisepar.indf, nu_low, nu_up, return_only=True, sampling=sampling)
        dict_lpe1 = inst.NEP_lpefilter_220(noisepar, noisepar.lpe1, nu_low, nu_up, return_only=True, sampling=sampling)
        dict_lpe2 = inst.NEP_lpefilter_220(noisepar, noisepar.lpe2, nu_low, nu_up, return_only=True, sampling=sampling)        
        
    dict_last = inst.NEP_lastfilter(noisepar, return_only=True, sampling=sampling)
    
    allnoisearray = [dict_before_horns, dict_horns, dict_combiner, dict_coldspot, dict_dich, dict_ndf, dict_lpe1, dict_lpe2, dict_last]
    
    return allnoisearray
```

```{python}
# el last filter es el mismo para las dos bandas
```

```{python}
allnoise_150 = load_NEP_components(inst150, noisepar_150, band_150=True)
```

```{python}
allnoise_220 = load_NEP_components(inst220, noisepar_220, band_150=False)
```

```{python}
dict_before_horns = allnoise_150[0]
ncomp_before_horns = len(dict_before_horns["power"])
ncomp_after_horns = len(allnoise_150[1:])
```

```{python}
fig2, ax2 = plt.subplots(nrows = 3, ncols = 4, figsize = (16,12))
fig2.suptitle('Power of the detected radiation for components before horns (150 band)')
ax2 = ax2.ravel()
for j in range(ncomp_before_horns):
    ax2[j].cla()
    plt.axes(ax2[j])
    ax2[j].set_title("{}".format(noisepar_150.names[j]))
    cp = ax2[j].scatter(inst150.detector.center.T[0],
                        inst150.detector.center.T[1],
                        c = allnoise_150[0]['power'][j], marker = 's')
    cbar = fig2.colorbar(cp,)
    ax2[j].set_xticklabels("")
    ax2[j].set_yticklabels("")
    ax2[j].set_aspect('equal')
    
#plt.show()

plt.savefig('phonoise_focalplane_before150.png')
```

```{python}
fig2, ax2 = plt.subplots(nrows = 3, ncols = 4, figsize = (16,12))
fig2.suptitle('Power of the detected radiation for components before horns (220 band)')
ax2 = ax2.ravel()
for j in range(ncomp_before_horns):
    ax2[j].cla()
    plt.axes(ax2[j])
    ax2[j].set_title("{}".format(noisepar_220.names[j]))
    cp = ax2[j].scatter(inst220.detector.center.T[0],
                        inst220.detector.center.T[1],
                        c = allnoise_220[0]['power'][j], marker = 's')
    cbar = fig2.colorbar(cp,)
    ax2[j].set_xticklabels("")
    ax2[j].set_yticklabels("")
    ax2[j].set_aspect('equal')
    
#plt.show()
plt.savefig('phonoise_focalplane_before220.png')
```

```{python}
fig2, ax2 = plt.subplots(nrows = 1, ncols = 2, figsize = (16,12))

cp = ax2[0].scatter(inst150.detector.center.T[0],
                inst150.detector.center.T[1],
                c = allnoise_150[2]['power'], marker = 's')
cbar = fig2.colorbar(cp, ax=ax2[0], fraction=0.046, pad=0.04)
ax2[0].set_xticklabels("")
ax2[0].set_yticklabels("")
ax2[0].set_aspect('equal')
ax2[0].set_title('Integration 150GHz')
cp = ax2[1].scatter(inst220.detector.center.T[0],
                inst220.detector.center.T[1],
                c = allnoise_220[2]['power'], marker = 's')
cbar = fig2.colorbar(cp, ax=ax2[1], fraction=0.046, pad=0.04)
ax2[1].set_title('Thin band 220GHz')

ax2[1].set_xticklabels("")
ax2[1].set_yticklabels("")
ax2[1].set_aspect('equal')
```

```{python}

```

```{python}

```

```{python}
fig2, ax2 = plt.subplots(nrows = 3, ncols = 4, figsize = (16,12))
fig2.suptitle('Power of the detected radiation for components after horns (150 band)')
ax2 = ax2.ravel()
for j in range(0, ncomp_after_horns):
    ax2[j].cla()
    plt.axes(ax2[j])
    ax2[j].set_title("{}".format(noisepar_150.names[j+ncomp_before_horns]))
    cp = ax2[j].scatter(inst150.detector.center.T[0],
                        inst150.detector.center.T[1],
                        c = allnoise_150[j+1]['power'], marker = 's')
    cbar = fig2.colorbar(cp,)
    ax2[j].set_xticklabels("")
    ax2[j].set_yticklabels("")
    ax2[j].set_aspect('equal')

plt.savefig('phonoise_focalplane_after150.png')
#plt.show()
```

```{python}
fig2, ax2 = plt.subplots(nrows = 3, ncols = 4, figsize = (16,12))
fig2.suptitle('Power of the detected radiation for components after horns (220 band)')
ax2 = ax2.ravel()
for j in range(0, ncomp_after_horns):
    ax2[j].cla()
    plt.axes(ax2[j])
    ax2[j].set_title("{}".format(noisepar_220.names[j+ncomp_before_horns]))
    cp = ax2[j].scatter(inst220.detector.center.T[0],
                        inst220.detector.center.T[1],
                        c = allnoise_220[j+1]['power'], marker = 's')
    cbar = fig2.colorbar(cp,)
    ax2[j].set_xticklabels("")
    ax2[j].set_yticklabels("")
    ax2[j].set_aspect('equal')

plt.savefig('phonoise_focalplane_after220.png')

#plt.show()
```

```{python}
results_220_afterhorns_corr = {}

for j in range(0, ncomp_after_horns):

    name = noisepar_220.names[j+ncomp_before_horns]
    results_220_afterhorns_corr[name] = {
        'P_max': allnoise_220[j+1]['power'].max(),
        'NEP_max': allnoise_220[j+1]['NEP_array'].max(),
    }
```

```{python}
results_150_afterhorns_corr = {}

for j in range(0, ncomp_after_horns):

    name = noisepar_150.names[j+ncomp_before_horns]
    results_150_afterhorns_corr[name] = {
        'P_max': allnoise_150[j+1]['power'].max(),
        'NEP_max': allnoise_150[j+1]['NEP_array'].max(),
    }
```

```{python}
results_220_afterhorns_corr[b'ba2ba']['P_max']
```

```{python}
import pickle

with open("results_220_afterhorns_corr.pkl", "wb") as f:
    pickle.dump(results_220_afterhorns_corr, f)
```

```{python}
with open("results_220_afterhorns.pkl", "rb") as f:
    results_220_afterhorns = pickle.load(f)
```

```{python}
with open("results_150_afterhorns.pkl", "rb") as f:
    results_150_afterhorns = pickle.load(f)
```

```{python}
table_afterhorns_150 = []

for j in range(ncomp_after_horns):
    name = noisepar_150.names[j + ncomp_before_horns]

    P_mono = results_150_afterhorns[name]['P_max']
    P_int  = results_150_afterhorns_corr[name]['P_max']

    NEP_mono = results_150_afterhorns[name]['NEP_max']
    NEP_int  = results_150_afterhorns_corr[name]['NEP_max']

    table_afterhorns_150.append({
        'component': name,
        'P_mono': P_mono,
        'P_int': P_int,
        'P_ratio': P_int / P_mono if P_mono != 0 else np.nan,
        'NEP_mono': NEP_mono,
        'NEP_int': NEP_int,
        'NEP_ratio': NEP_int / NEP_mono if NEP_mono != 0 else np.nan,
    })
```

```{python}
table_afterhorns_220 = []

for j in range(ncomp_after_horns):
    name = noisepar_220.names[j + ncomp_before_horns]

    P_mono = results_220_afterhorns[name]['P_max']
    P_int  = results_220_afterhorns_corr[name]['P_max']

    NEP_mono = results_220_afterhorns[name]['NEP_max']
    NEP_int  = results_220_afterhorns_corr[name]['NEP_max']

    table_afterhorns_220.append({
        'component': name,
        'P_mono': P_mono,
        'P_int': P_int,
        'P_ratio': P_int / P_mono if P_mono != 0 else np.nan,
        'NEP_mono': NEP_mono,
        'NEP_int': NEP_int,
        'NEP_ratio': NEP_int / NEP_mono if NEP_mono != 0 else np.nan,
    })
```

```{python}
temp_dict_220 = {
    noisepar_220.names[i]: noisepar_220.temperatures[i]
    for i in range(len(noisepar_220.names))
}

temp_dict_150 = {
    noisepar_150.names[i]: noisepar_150.temperatures[i]
    for i in range(len(noisepar_150.names))
}
```

```{python}
print(f"{'Component':15s} {'T[K]':>8s} {'P_int_corr/P_int':>15s} {'NEP_int_corr/NEP_int':>20s}")
print("-"*55)

for row in table_afterhorns_150:
    name = row['component']
    T = temp_dict_150.get(name, np.nan)

    print(
        f"{name:15s} "
        f"{T:8.1f} "
        f"{row['P_ratio']:.6e}"
        f"{row['NEP_ratio']:20.3f}"
    )
```

```{python}

```

```{python}
print(f"{'Component':15s} {'T[K]':>8s} {'P_int/P_mono':>15s} {'NEP_int/NEP_mono':>20s}")
print("-"*55)

for row in table_afterhorns_220:
    name = row['component']
    T = temp_dict_220.get(name, np.nan)

    print(
        f"{name:15s} "
        f"{T:8.1f} "
        f"{row['P_ratio']:15.3f} "
        f"{row['NEP_ratio']:20.3f}"
    )

#for row in table_afterhorns:
#    print(f"{row['component']:15s} {row['P_ratio']:15.3f} {row['NEP_ratio']:20.3f}")

```

```{python}
noisepar_220.temperatures[1+ncomp_before_horns]
```

```{python}

```

```{python}
def g(nu):
    return (nu/c)**2

def planck(nu, T):
    return h*nu / (np.exp(h*nu/(k*T)) - 1)

def integrand(nu, T):
    return g(nu)*planck(nu, T)

def cociente(nu, T):
    return np.exp(h*nu/(k*T))
```

```{python}
temp_b2b = noisepar_220.temperatures[ncomp_before_horns]
temp_comb = noisepar_220.temperatures[1+ncomp_before_horns]
temp_cs = noisepar_220.temperatures[2+ncomp_before_horns]
temp_dicro = noisepar_220.temperatures[3+ncomp_before_horns]
temp_ndf = noisepar_220.temperatures[4+ncomp_before_horns]
temp_flp1 = noisepar_220.temperatures[5+ncomp_before_horns]
temp_flp2 = noisepar_220.temperatures[6+ncomp_before_horns]
temp_bdf = noisepar_220.temperatures[7+ncomp_before_horns]

```

```{python}
nus = np.linspace(197e9, 243e9, 1000)
nu0 = 220e9
```

```{python}
# %matplotlib inline
```

```{python}

```

```{python}
fig, ax = plt.subplots(2, 2, figsize=(10,7))

ax[0,0].plot(nus/1e9, integrand(nus,temp_b2b))
ax[0,0].axhline(integrand(nu0,temp_b2b), ls='--', color='magenta', label=r'mono $I(\nu_0)$')
ax[0,0].axhline(
    np.trapz(integrand(nus,temp_b2b), nus)/(nus[-1]-nus[0]), color='black',
    ls=':', label='band average'
)
ax[0,0].legend()
#ax[0,0].set_xlabel(r"$\nu [GHz]$")
ax[0,0].set_ylabel(r"$I(\nu) = g(\nu) B(\nu,T)$")
ax[0,0].set_title('B2B')

ax[0,1].plot(nus/1e9, integrand(nus,temp_comb))
ax[0,1].axhline(integrand(nu0,temp_comb), ls='--', color='magenta', label=r'mono $I(\nu_0)$')
ax[0,1].axhline(
    np.trapz(integrand(nus,temp_comb), nus)/(nus[-1]-nus[0]), color='black',
    ls=':', label='band average'
)
ax[0,1].legend()
#ax[0,1].set_xlabel(r"$\nu [GHz]$")
ax[0,1].set_ylabel(r"$I(\nu) = g(\nu) B(\nu,T)$")
ax[0,1].set_title('comb')

ax[1,0].plot(nus/1e9, integrand(nus,temp_cs))
ax[1,0].axhline(integrand(nu0,temp_cs), ls='--', color='magenta', label=r'mono $I(\nu_0)$')
ax[1,0].axhline(
    np.trapz(integrand(nus,temp_cs), nus)/(nus[-1]-nus[0]), color='black',
    ls=':', label='band average'
)
ax[1,0].legend()
ax[1,0].set_xlabel(r"$\nu [GHz]$")
ax[1,0].set_ylabel(r"$I(\nu) = g(\nu) B(\nu,T)$")
ax[1,0].set_title('coldstop')

ax[1,1].plot(nus/1e9, integrand(nus,temp_flp1))
ax[1,1].axhline(integrand(nu0,temp_flp1), ls='--', color='magenta', label=r'mono $I(\nu_0)$')
ax[1,1].axhline(
    np.trapz(integrand(nus,temp_flp1), nus)/(nus[-1]-nus[0]), color='black',
    ls=':', label='band average'
)
ax[1,1].legend()
ax[1,1].set_xlabel(r"$\nu [GHz]$")
ax[1,1].set_ylabel(r"$I(\nu) = g(\nu) B(\nu,T)$")
ax[1,1].set_title('9cmlpe')
```

```{python}
for j in range(0, ncomp_after_horns):
    
    name = noisepar_220.names[j+ncomp_before_horns]
    print(name)
    print('P_max:', results_220_afterhorns[name]['P_max'], results_220_afterhorns_corr[name]['P_max'])
    print('NEP_max:', results_220_afterhorns[name]['NEP_max'], results_220_afterhorns_corr[name]['NEP_max'])

```

```{python}

```
